title: Formula Column Type in "Search Everything"

posts.author: ethancreveling (Ethan Dust)
posts.cookedHtml:
For some reason, you can’t search via the “Formula” column type with the search tool at the top right of monday.com

You can do this on the board level, but not across boards.

Our team uses the formula number as the primary key for distinguishing items and so it would be extremely helpful for us.

Please upvote.

Thanks!
